msContents.summary:
[p]Medical miscellany[/p]
[p][b]Contents[/b][/p]
[p]1. ff. 1r-90v Johannes de Concoregio, [i]De aegritudinibus particularibus[/i][/p]
[p]f. 1r Mea in ecelsitudinem Vestram deuotio. Illustrissime Princeps ... Ad eius prohemium et consequenter tractatum in dei nomine Accedo. Cum omnis scientia ex fine ac eius utilitate naturaliter appetatu ... Inchoatus fuit iste liber post annum 34m nostre lecture per prius in studio Bononiensi inchoate et per posterius in plerisque aliis studiis Italie continuate et vltimo in preclaro studio papiense et completus fuit annoi domini. 1438. f. 1v Primus tractatus continet capitula 89. Primum capitulum de ortu capitlorum ... capitulum de ornatu faciei. f. 2r Capitulum primum de ortu capillorum. Capillus nascitur ex vapore fumoso terrestri ... f. 90v Et in hoc fiatur prima pars de egritudinibus particularibus huius ousculi. Explicit Lucidarium in practica Medicine compillatum per Iohannem concoregium Mediolanensem. finis. Laus deo. Deo Gratias. Amen. Vive memor laeti.[/p]
[p]ff. 91r-92v blank.[/p]
[p]2. ff. 92v-152r Johannes de Concoregio, [i]Summula de curis febrium[/i][/p]
[p]f. 92v Tabula accidentium febris. Tabula effimerarum febrium. f. 93r Quoniam iuxta sententian platonis philosophi prorsus moralissimi non solum nobis nati sumus ... f. 152r ... Sicca enim tarde suscipiunt immutacionem et tarde autem amittunt. Et sic laus deo glorioso et eius suffragio huic sumulle frinem feci. Scripta per me magistrum Bartolomenum de festoraziis de belano et finita die primo Madii 1459 2 anno inceptionis mei studii.[/p]
[p]3. ff. 152r-v Gentile da Foligno, [i]Consilium de peste[/i][/p]
[p]f. 152r Consilium pro peste. De pestilentia que accidit Janue veniens de partibus orientalibus et meridionalibus Et occupavit omnia loca marium et pervenit ad civitatem perusinam anno domini 1348 tempore pestis magne ... f. 152v Ponantur ii croci et ii gariofilorum. finis. Explicit consilium gentilis ad pestem.[/p]
[p]4. ff. 153r-156r Anonymous, [i]Introductio ad scientiam medicinae[/i][/p]
[p]f. 153r Quoniam incipere operari in scientia medicine novitiorum extitit confusio ... f. 156r ... cuius bursa ex inanitione sepissime sincopizar.[/p]
[p]5. ff. 156r-157r Arnold of Villanova, [i]De cautelis urinarum[/i][/p]
[p]f. 156r Tractatus de cautellis urinarum. Circha urinas cautelle alique sunt notande ... f. 157r ... et minus illa fuit prima et sequens est 2a. Finis.[/p]
[p]6. ff. 157r-161v Miscellaneous medical receipts, classes and doses of remedies, etc.[/p]
[p]7. ff. 162r-v Pseudo-Hippocrates, [i]Capsula eburnea[/i][/p]
[p]f. 162r Pronostica ypocratis inuenta in capsula eburnea. Liber Veritatis ab ypocrate editus pervenit ad nos .... f. 162v ... desiderium dulcium desiderio vehementi. Explicit. Et sciatis quod olea de phisticis et amydalis iuvantia sunt omnibus speciebus idropisis.[/p]
[p]8. ff. 163r-169r Galen, [i]De facile parabilibus[/i][/p]
[p]f. 163r Incipit liber Galieni de facile aquisilibus medicinis ad salonem archimedicum. Galienus caludiansus Saloni archimedico salutem. Quia petisti ... f. 169r ... a vespa vel aranea esse mordicatum. finis. laus sit christo.[/p]
[p]9. ff. 169v-171r Antonius Astensis, [i]Consilium ad vomitum[/i][/p]
[p]f. 169v Consilium ad vomitum. Ista est littera missa magistro alberto de placentia a quodam magistro Antonio medico in asti cui magister albertus fecit responsum faciens bonum consilium ut infra patebit. Dimissis multis de quibus in scriptis possit fieri mentio ... f. 171r ... catullum quem sic teneret aplicatum ad stomachum hora digestionis adhuc esset melius.[/p]
[p]10. ff. 173r-179r Arnold of Villanova, [i]De vinis[/i], beginning wanting[/p]
[p]f. 173r ... seu in incorporationis rerum que uino admiscerentur ... Capitulum primum. Vinum Mirabille pro melancolicis cardiacis et adhusta colera laborantibus ... f. 179r ... credentes debere propter hoc aquirere victoriam et Salutem Laus deo.[/p]

msItem.title: Medical miscellany
msItem.filiation: Written by Magister Bartholomaeus de Festoraziis. The unfoliated leaf pasted on to the upper cover contains a note by the scribe 'Medical habent unum hospitalle quod habet 8 cameras optimas et perutilles', i.e. eight maxims for medical practice. The leaf pasted on the lower cover contains some medical receipts and a personal note 'Ego M. Bartolomeus de festoraziis feci disputationem meam in medicinis die decia octaua mensis Junii 1460 et fuit tertius annus mei studii et disputaui utrum pregnantes sint purgande et vtrum mulieres sint frigidiores viris et erat tunc rector papie dominus M. Antonius Januensis etc. 1461 feci quodlibetum in medicina primo Martii dubia fuerunt vtrum medicus aliquis debeat euacuare usque ad sincopim et vtrum in die crisis sit fienda euacuatio. Factus sum doctor die 24 eodem anno...'.

objectDesc.supportDesc: 1 volumeI l. + 179 ff. + I l. folio. 33 x 23 cm. Pavia. Original deerskin covers over wooden boards, worn, rebacked with vellum: both clasps wanting. First and last unfolidated leaves pasted on covers. A leaf has been torn out between ff. 160/161, and fol. 172 wanting. Written in a semi-gothic hand in double column of 49 lines to a column. Initials, paragraph marks and a few headings in red.

binding.p: I l. + 179 ff. + I l. folio. 33 x 23 cm. Pavia. Original deerskin covers over wooden boards, worn, rebacked with vellum: both clasps wanting. First and last unfolidated leaves pasted on covers. A leaf has been torn out between ff. 160/161, and fol. 172 wanting. Written in a semi-gothic hand in double column of 49 lines to a column. Initials, paragraph marks and a few headings in red.

bibl.title: Catalogue of Western Manuscripts on Medicine and Science in the Wellcome Historical Medical Library
bibl.author: S. A. J. Moorat
bibl.publisher: Wellcome Institute for the History of Medicine

custodialHist.custEvent: Catalogue description modified in 2014. For original description, see S.A.J. Moorat, [i]Catalogue of Western Manuscripts on Medicine and Science in the Wellcome Historical Medical Library[/i] (London: Wellcome Institute for the History of Medicine, 1962-1973).

revisionDesc.change: Transformed Calm xml export to TEI xml file using a transformation scenario
Manual edits following automated Calm-TEI transformation
